subject.description: Phase 1 control record for the proposed S1 chair pilot; no production definition has been accepted.

dependencies.name: Primary S1 prototype evidence
conditions: Select and identify calibrated scan, CAD, drawing or measurement evidence before defining production geometry.
Record field/component provenance and the authority for the intended package licence.
Resolve the current field-level block recorded in reference/lineage/phase1-s1-core-lineage.json.

contribution_attestation.reference: No contributor or supplier declaration exists because the evidence has not been selected.

registered_designs.notes: The precise prototype and production evidence have not been selected.

unregistered_designs.notes: The design date, first marketing and evidence ownership have not been established.

patents.notes: No patent relevance assessment has been performed for the selected evidence or intended manufacturing path.

trade_marks.notes: The proposed package name and any embedded branding have not been reviewed.

project_status.reason: Primary evidence, permissions, contribution authority and non-copyright-rights review are unresolved.

dependencies.name: Templot5 revision 556b local comparison evidence
conditions: The reviewed source expression states GPL-3.0-or-later, but this mixed comparison record also includes reference data and media whose production and redistribution status is not established.
Keep the archive and any generated comparison artifact local and untracked.
Do not promote comparison values into the canonical package without a separately accepted evidence chain.

contribution_attestation.reference: External local comparison evidence; no TrackTemplateMacro package contribution is being accepted.

registered_designs.notes: Not assessed because this record is excluded from the production definition; promotion would require a new review.

unregistered_designs.notes: Not assessed because this record is excluded from the production definition; promotion would require a new review.

patents.notes: Not assessed because this record is excluded from the production definition; promotion would require a new review.

trade_marks.notes: No Templot name, logo or branding may be embedded in production output through this comparison record.

project_status.reason: The archive is retained only as a local source-informed comparison oracle and is not a canonical or output dependency.

registered_designs.notes: No package geometry exists and the precise prototype has not been confirmed.

unregistered_designs.notes: No package geometry exists and the relevant design history has not been established.

patents.notes: No package or manufacturing claim set exists to assess.

trade_marks.notes: The final package name and embedded content are undecided.

project_status.reason: The pilot is intentionally blocked by the current lineage register: primary evidence, package data, licence authority, non-copyright-rights reviews and owner acceptance are incomplete.
